text:
hardware: 0x8086:0x8b1, subsys ids: 0x8080:0xc170, iwm model 7260.

What was leading into the crash, going on before or while the panic, was some (heavy) transmission traffic, and /maybe/ some instability caused by restarting wlan several times ('netif restart wlanxyz')

Sidenote: I have been observing unreliable association for a while now.
